results.name: mural-mir-nims
results.description: A 2x2 mural by Adam Rex. Going clockwise: Lasher, Shrieker, Shambler, Devourer.

results.description: Mural position starting from the top left: X: 1, Y: 1, where X is horizontal.

results.name: murasa
results.description: A forested continent of Zendikar

results.name: mutiny
results.description: Cards that can make multiple creatures under the same players control fight (or [bite](one-sided-fight))

results.name: mutual sacrifice
results.description: Everyone sacrifices something.

results.name: mycosynth
results.description: A fungal organism that spread through Phyrexian-corrupted Mirrodin.

results.name: naga
results.description: A species of snake people with long tails and humanoid torsos. Known to exist on Tarkir and Amonkhet.

results.name: nahiri (phyrexian)
results.description: Nahiri, compleated.

results.name: naiad
results.description: Blue-aligned nymph of the waters.

results.name: nail
results.description: The type driven in with a hammer. For the anatomy, see [fingernail], [claw] or [talon].

results.name: naktamun
results.description: The central city of Amonkhet and once home to its gods.

results.name: named choice
results.description: Players choose something, but the choices are given names, rather than choosing the effect itself.

results.name: named token
results.description: Tokens that have a specific name, rather than inheriting their name from their type line.

results.name: name matters
results.description: Effects that care about card names: different names, same name, specific name, etc.

results.name: namesake spell
results.description: Spells (or, mostly spells) with names that identify them with a specific named character.

results.name: nandor
results.description: The Nandor (singular Nando) are a branch of elves in Lord of the Rings.
